title: 1Password vs Fathom
description: Compare 1Password vs Fathom — a security & compliance platform versus a analytics & data solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: 1Password (Security & Compliance) and Fathom (Analytics & Data) serve different primary purposes. 1Password has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is security & compliance or analytics & data capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between 1Password and Fathom?
faqs.answer: 1Password is a security & compliance tool, while Fathom is a analytics & data platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can 1Password replace Fathom?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, 1Password or Fathom?
faqs.answer: 1Password ($7.99/mo per user) and Fathom ($14-54/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
